hook: AI gave you a 47-bullet action plan. You asked for help starting your morning.
caption:
AI gave you a 47-bullet action plan. You asked for help starting your morning.

This is the thing nobody talks about.

AI doesn't know if you're a "give me the full system" person or a "just tell me the one thing" person.

So it guesses. And it usually guesses wrong.

The Systematic Thinker in you wants the framework, the dependencies, the logic behind each step.

The Intuitive Thinker needs one clear direction and space to figure out the rest.

Neither is better. But getting the wrong one? That's why you've closed a ChatGPT tab mid-response and gone back to the notes app.

BootFile maps which one you actually are — and bakes it into every prompt you run.

No more "here are 7 things to consider."

Just the response that fits how your brain works.

Which type are you — do you want the full map or just the next turn?
